CONTRACT/WARRANTY, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF HUA, QING MEI DBA AS HUA'S WORD AS TO DEFENDANT WONG FAMILY REVOCABLE TRUST DOES 1 TO 20 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR SEP-30-2015 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  JUN-30-2015 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         SEP-08-2015

REAL PROPERTY/HOUSING MOTION 501, DEFENDANT WONG FAMILY REVOCABLE TRUST'S MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT IS GRANTED IN PART AND DENIED IN PART. MOTION IS GRANTED AS TO THE REQUEST FOR PUNITIVE DAMAGES WITH LEAVE TO AMEND TO ADDRESS ALL ISSUES RAISED BY THE MOTION. MOTION IS DENIED AS TO THE REQUEST FOR ATTORNEY'S FEES. COMPLAINT ALLEGES THAT FEES THAT THE LEASE CONTAINS AN ATTORNEYS' FEES PROVISION (PARAGRAPH 92). PREVAILING PARTY TO SUBMIT ORDER IN COMPLIANCE WITH CRC 3.1312(B). JUDGE: RONALD E. QUIDACHAY, CLERK: M. GOODMAN, NOT REPORTED (D501)
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF SEP-30-2015 CONTINUED TO NOV-25-2015 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR DEFENDANT(S) TO FILE AND SERVE ORDER RE: DEMURRER. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
MASTER JURY CALENDAR SET FOR JUL-05-2016 VACATED. DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION FILED ON 5/20/16. (206)

MASTER CALENDAR JURY

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-12-2015 Set For Trial On Jul-05-16 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-11-2015 Continued To Nov-25-15 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Aug-25-2015 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT WONG FAMILY REVOCABLE TRUST DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is SUSTAINED with leave to amend to address all issues raised by demurrer. Prevailing party to submit order in compliance with CRC 3.1312(b). Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported (D501)

MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Aug-25-2015 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT WONG FAMILY REVOCABLE TRUST's MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT is GRANTED in part and denied in part. Motion is GRANTED as to the request for punitive damages with leave to amend to address all issues raised by the motion. Motion is DENIED as to the request for attorney's fees. Complaint alleges that fees that the lease contains an attorneys' fees provision (paragraph 92). Prevailing party to submit order in compliance with CRC 3.1312(b). Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported (D501)
